vulnerability.title: Implement STIG Sub Crypto Policy
vulnerability.description: Create a custom cryptographic policy to follow the guidance from DISA.
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: cat << 'EOF' > /etc/crypto-policies/policies/modules/STIG.pmod cipher@SSH=AES-256-GCM AES-256-CTR AES-128-GCM AES-128-CTR mac@SSH=HMAC-SHA2-512 HMAC-SHA2-256 EOF sudo update-crypto-policies --set FIPS:STIG

triage_decision.reason: This finding involves applying a custom cryptographic policy module that aligns with DISA STIG guidance. The remediation script creates a policy file and updates crypto policies, which is a standard hardening practice. It does not involve dangerous operations like partitioning, bootloader changes, or FIPS mode toggling. The changes are limited to cryptographic settings and policy updates, which are safe and follow established STIG patterns.
